ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breweries" (
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewery */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the brewery */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the brewery is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the brewery is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of brewery (e.g., taproom, brewpub, production facility) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brewery was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the brewery */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brewery's website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brewery is currently active */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the brewery */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the brewery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery the location belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Operating hours of the location */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the location's specific page or website */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is currently open */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the brewery (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text review provided by the user */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery the owner is associated with */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the owner is the primary contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_owners_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., brewery owner, administrator, regular user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
